title: Brief #0219 - Demand AI - The Impact of AI On B2B Marketing

textRun.content: Brief #0219 - Demand AI - The Impact of AI On B2B Marketing
The Impact of AI On B2B Marketing
One Bernam, 4th Floor Gourmet Function Room, 1 Bernam Street, Singapore 078852
To record an informal business panel with clients to be used for future brand content.
AI's Impact on ROI: Shifting Business Metrics
Professional yet informal business setting. The focus is on high-quality audio and sharp visuals from multiple angles to facilitate internal editing.
End, final B-roll, and pack up
5x Lapel Microphones (Primary Audio) and 2x Standing Microphones (Aesthetic Only).
Lighting kit to ensure high-end corporate aesthetic.
Raw audio and video files only; no post-production.
Ahead of the client call, the main things the crew needs to clarify are:
Room photos/video (seating layout, existing lighting, and power outlet positions).
Confirmation of the 2-camera coverage: Camera A as a locked wide shot of the full panel, and Camera B as an active close-up angle that pans/follows the current speaker.
Confirmation that the 5 lav mics are for 5 separate speakers.
Positioning and visual purpose of the 2 visual standing mics.
Specific B-roll needed after the panel.
Early crew access to the room (earlier than 1:00pm) for setup.
